name: MiniMax Coding Plan (minimaxi.com)

dataResidency.euRegionDetails: MiniMax documentation for developer products distinguishes between "中国大陆服务" (Mainland China service) and "全球 Global 服务". No EU region or EU-only processing option was found in the provider's primary documentation, so EU-only processing is not guaranteed and inference may leave the EU.

notes: Primary-source materials confirm the developer platform/API exists, that Coding Plan has a free trial period for personal developers before paid plans, and that MiniMax distinguishes Mainland China and Global service routing. However, no public DPA/AVV, sub-processor list, retention schedule, SCC commitment, or security certification page was found in the provider’s primary documentation reviewed.
